steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “did just that” is crucial. It means the fountain actually achieved Duchamp's intention to challenge prevailing conceptions about art.

steps.title: Match the confirmation logic
steps.content: ”Indeed” directly affirms that the sculpture fulfilled what was intended. The other three fail because they either introduce new information, suggest a parallel, or signal contrast—none confirm the relationship between intention and actual outcome. That matches choice D — D is correct.
